why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:show_dialog must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and official context-free NoticeDialog body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one direct NoticeDialog fixture only, not dialog UI display behavior, screen flow, registry-backed dialogs, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_show_dialog_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 18, official context-free dialog body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x12.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundShowDialogPacket(Holder.direct(NoticeDialog)), ClientboundShowDialogPacket.CONTEXT_FREE_STREAM_CODEC, Dialog.CONTEXT_FREE_STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundShowDialogPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), and ClientboundShowDialogPacket.dialog().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound show_dialog dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains cookie_request id 0x00 through clear_dialog id 0x11, but not show_dialog id 0x12.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x12 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound show_dialog packet id 18
